response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and domains, but his resume does not demonstrate deep expertise in Java/Kotlin, Spring, or JVM tooling, which are core requirements for this role. His background leans heavily toward Node.js, TypeScript, and Dlang, with limited evidence of contributions to IDE internals or enterprise JVM ecosystems.
strengths: Strong software engineering fundamentals with diverse language experience
Proven ability to work on complex, large-scale systems and microservices
Demonstrated interest in developer tooling and automation (e.g., MCP, CI/CD)
concerns: Lacks explicit experience with Java/Kotlin, Spring, or JVM internals
No visible contributions to language tooling, IDEs, or enterprise frameworks
Primary stack (Node.js, TypeScript, Dlang) does not align with JVM-focused requirements
